title: Modified Qiagen gel extraction with MinElute spin column.
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"fiv68","text":"The protocol remains unmodified from original kit protocol, with the exception of steps 9, 10 and 11.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 3 volumes of Buffer QG to gel slice (e.g. 300 μL per 0.1 g of gel.)
Incubate at 50º C for 10 minutes, or until gel slice is dissolved. Mix every 2-3 minutes. 00:10:00, Incubation 00:03:00, Mix
Add 1 gel volume of isopropanol and mix by inverting.
Place 800 μL of sample in a QIAquick column within a collection tube, spin at maximum speed for 1 minute. undetermined, Sample 00:01:00, Maximum speed
If any sample remains, continue spinning through column and discard flow-through.
Add 500 μL of buffer QG, spin for 1 minute, and discard flow-through. undetermined, Buffer QG 00:01:00, Spin in centrifuge
Wash with 750 μL of buffer PE, let stand 2-5 minutes, spin for 1 minute, discard flow through. undetermined, Buffer PE 00:05:00, Let stand 2-5 minutes 00:01:00, Spin in centrifuge.
Clean top edge and bottom edge of collection tube by pipetting out remaining liquid with P20. Modified from original kit protocol.
Place column with hinge facing INWARDS and spin for 1 minute at maximum speed. 00:01:00, At maximum speed Modified from original kit protocol.
Place column with hinge facing OUTWARDS and spin for 1 minute at maximum speed. 00:01:00, At maximum speed Modified from original kit protocol.
Place column in new 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube.
Add 10.3 μL of water. undetermined, Water
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute to elute. 00:01:00, Centrifuge at maximum speed.
creator: Daniel J. Richter
